name: Blue-Eyes White Dragon
desc: This legendary dragon is a powerful engine of destruction. Virtually invincible, very few have faced this awesome creature and lived to tell the tale.

name: Blue-Eyes White Dragon
desc: This legendary dragon is a powerful engine of destruction. Virtually invincible, very few have faced this awesome creature and lived to tell the tale.

name: Blue-Eyes White Dragon
desc: This legendary dragon is a powerful engine of destruction. Virtually invincible, very few have faced this awesome creature and lived to tell the tale.

name: Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon
desc: "Blue-Eyes White Dragon" + "Blue-Eyes White Dragon" + "Blue-Eyes White Dragon"

name: Battle Ox
desc: A monster with tremendous power, it destroys enemies with a swing of its axe.

name: Battle Ox
desc: A monster with tremendous power, it destroys enemies with a swing of its axe.

name: Judge Man
desc: This club-wielding warrior battles to the end and will never surrender.

name: Vorse Raider
desc: This wicked Beast-Warrior does every horrid thing imaginable, and loves it! His axe bears the marks of his countless victims.

name: Vorse Raider
desc: This wicked Beast-Warrior does every horrid thing imaginable, and loves it! His axe bears the marks of his countless victims.

name: La Jinn the Mystical Genie of the Lamp
desc: A genie of the lamp that is at the beck and call of its master.

name: La Jinn the Mystical Genie of the Lamp
desc: A genie of the lamp that is at the beck and call of its master.

name: Saggi the Dark Clown
desc: This clown appears from nowhere and executes very strange moves to avoid enemy attacks.

name: Saggi the Dark Clown
desc: This clown appears from nowhere and executes very strange moves to avoid enemy attacks.

name: Swordstalker
desc: A monster formed by the vengeful souls of those who passed away in battle.

name: Ryu-Kishin Powered
desc: A gargoyle enhanced by the powers of darkness. Very sharp talons make it a worthy opponent.

name: Hitotsu-Me Giant
desc: A one-eyed behemoth with thick, powerful arms made for delivering punishing blows.

name: Koumori Dragon
desc: A vicious, fire-breathing dragon whose wicked flame corrupts the souls of its victims.

name: Mystic Horseman
desc: Half man and half horse, this monster is known for its extreme speed.

name: Rabid Horseman
desc: "Battle Ox" + "Mystic Horseman"

name: Lord of D.
desc: Neither player can target Dragon monsters on the field with card effects.

name: Lord of D.
desc: Neither player can target Dragon monsters on the field with card effects.

name: The Flute of Summoning Dragon
desc: Special Summon up to 2 Dragon monsters from your hand. "Lord of D." must be on the field to activate and to resolve this effect.

name: The Flute of Summoning Dragon
desc: Special Summon up to 2 Dragon monsters from your hand. "Lord of D." must be on the field to activate and to resolve this effect.

name: Crush Card Virus
desc: Tribute 1 DARK monster with 1000 or less ATK; your opponent takes no damage until the end of the next turn after this card resolves, also, you look at your opponent's hand and all monsters they control, and if you do, destroy the monsters among them with 1500 or more ATK, then your opponent can destroy up to 3 monsters with 1500 or more ATK in their Deck.

name: Ring of Destruction
desc: During your opponent's turn: Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls whose ATK is less than or equal to their LP; destroy that face-up monster, and if you do, take damage equal to its original ATK, then inflict damage to your opponent, equal to the damage you took. You can only activate 1 "Ring of Destruction" per turn.

name: Enemy Controller
desc:
Activate 1 of these effects.
● Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; change that target's battle position.
● Tribute 1 monster, then target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; take control of that target until the End Phase.

name: Soul Exchange
desc: Target 1 monster your opponent controls; this turn, if you Tribute a monster, you must Tribute that target, as if you controlled it. You cannot conduct your Battle Phase the turn you activate this card.

name: Burst Stream of Destruction
desc: If you control "Blue-Eyes White Dragon": Destroy all monsters your opponent controls. "Blue-Eyes White Dragon" you control cannot attack the turn you activate this card.

name: Polymerization
desc: Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field as Fusion Material.

name: Polymerization
desc: Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field as Fusion Material.

name: Magic Jammer
desc: When a Spell Card is activated: Discard 1 card; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy it.

name: Negate Attack
desc: When an opponent's monster declares an attack: Target the attacking monster; negate the attack, then end the Battle Phase.

name: Shadow Spell
desc: Activate this card by targeting 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; it loses 700 ATK, also it cannot attack or change its battle position. When it leaves the field, destroy this card.

name: Rude Kaiser
desc: With an axe in each hand, this monster delivers heavy damage.

name: Ancient Lamp
desc: During your Main Phase: You can Special Summon "La Jinn the Mystical Genie of the Lamp" from your hand. This card must be face-up on the field to activate and to resolve this effect. Before damage calculation, if this card is being attacked by an opponent's monster, and was face-down at the start of the Damage Step: You can target 1 monster your opponent controls, except the attacking monster; the attacking monster attacks it instead, and you proceed to damage calculation.

name: Mesmeric Control
desc: During your opponent's next turn after you activate this card, your opponent cannot change the battle positions of monsters, except with a card effect.

name: Gift of The Mystical Elf
desc: Increase your Life Points by 300 points for each monster on the field.
